name: Catlike Magic
short_description: Catlike Magic is a top-down auto-shooter where you attempt to dodge groups of gnomes, goblins and other types of short people. Learn magical skills, buy and upgrade items and then complain about getting destroyed by a swarm of lizards after only buying offensive items in this slightly unhinged game.
detailed_description:
You wake up one day feeling a sharp pain through your chest. All of a sudden, your senses start to betray you. Your innards feel as if they were on fire, girls appear cuter the more you look at them: you have been cursed! Delve into the dark depths of the rainforest and find the crypt from which your enchantment came!

Catlike Magic is a top-down auto-shooter bullet hell game where you play as a tiny cat mage trying to rid herself of a curse.

Features

  • Various magic powers to hurt your enemies with.
  • Special modifiers that significantly improve or change the function of your abilities.
  • Goblins that send you flying across the screen.
  • 30+ unique items that increase your stats and give you special effects.
  • 4 different playable characters, from tiny cats to bigger cats to goblins.
